Veterans Benefits: Wyoming has no individual income tax, so military retirement income is not taxed at the state level; qualifying veterans and surviving spouses may claim a $6,000 assessed-value property-tax exemption, or apply it to vehicle licensing fees if not used on real property.
LGBTQSource: HRC 2025 Casper MEI scorecard; MAP Wyoming overall policy score, live profile retrieved 2026-07-15
Description: Casper is a central Wyoming city on the North Platte River with a local VA clinic, no state income tax, and quick access to Casper Mountain, fishing, trails, and regional arts venues. Its affordability and outdoor access are strong retiree positives, while the county-level political profile is strongly conservative.
